landing.heroSubtitle: We file your taxes quickly, securely and for the maximum refund. Service in English and Spanish.
landing.service1Desc: Preparation of your 1040 with every deduction you are entitled to.
landing.service2Desc: We process your ITIN and claim your dependents correctly.
landing.service3Desc: Schedule C, 1099 and planning for independent workers.
landing.step2: We upload and review your information
landing.step3: We prepare and file your return

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: Send us your details and we will get back to you shortly.
contact.name: Full name
contact.success: Thank you! We received your message. A copy was downloaded to your device.

auth.confirmEmail: We sent you a confirmation email. Check your inbox to activate your account.
auth.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.minPassword: Password must be at least 6 characters.

form.title: Tax form
form.publicSubtitle: Fill in your details. A copy will be emailed and a PDF downloaded to your device.
form.autofillNote: We loaded your profile data. You can edit it before saving.
form.lockedNote: This form has been submitted and can no longer be edited.

process.title: Your process status
process.ready_for_reviewDesc: Your return is ready for you to review.
process.filedDesc: Your return was filed with the IRS.
process.completedDesc: Process completed. You can download your documents.

client.dashboardSubtitle: Overview of your activity and tax process.
client.myFormsEmpty: You have no forms yet. Start a new one.

preparer.clientsSubtitle: Select a client to view their data and forms.
preparer.searchClients: Search client by name or email
preparer.uploadSubtitle: Upload the final document so the client can see it.

security.notice: Your data (SSN, bank account) is transmitted securely and only authorized staff can view it.

contacts.title: Contacts / Clients
contacts.subtitle: All clients: select some or all, add manually, and log communication.
contacts.name: Name
contacts.linkHint: If the phone is already registered in a profile, it is linked automatically.
contacts.scopeHint: Email/SMS applies to selected, or to all if none selected.
contacts.phoneHint: To send SMS, open the CRM on your phone and tap 💬: the Messages app opens with the number and text ready.

ext.title: Received forms (external)
ext.subtitle: All forms submitted from the public site. Admins only.
ext.searchAny: Filter by any data (name, email, phone...)

pf.title: Client Profile Form
pf.subtitle: Income tax return — please complete all your details.
pf.returningQ: Were you our tax customer last year?
pf.referralQ: How did you hear about us?
pf.sec4docs: Supporting documents: insurance enrollment, school verification letter, physical form, childcare letter, lease agreement.
pf.sec4cont: 4. Dependents (continued) — if the dependent is not your child
pf.depSupportQ: Dependents not living with you but supported by you for at least 6 months?
pf.depQ1: Do you know where the child's parents are?
pf.depQ2: Did one of the parents live with you?
pf.depQ3: Did anyone else live with you?
pf.depQ4: Can anyone else possibly claim the child?
pf.depQ5: Is there an active 8332 Release/Revocation form in place?
pf.virtualCurrency: Did you buy or sell virtual currency? (if yes, attach 8949)
pf.hsa: Did you contribute to an HSA account?
pf.haveCard: Do you have the insurance card with you?
pf.legal: By signing this form, I certify that all information provided to Safe Taxes ATL is true and correct to the best of my knowledge. I understand that any IRS assessments, penalties or audits due to omissions or erroneous information are my responsibility, and I agree to pay for document preparation at the time of service.

footer.disclaimer: This portal handles sensitive information. Never share your password.
